title: Jump Reset Indicator
description: Informs the player on how close they were to performing a successful jump reset.
body:
# Junp Reset Indicator

Are you a budding sword fighter? Do you suffer from taking too much knockback? Do you require aid in figuring out timings?

Introducing this mod! With a simple HUD element to indicate by how much you missed the jump window (or if you hit it perfectly, congrats!).

## But what is a Jump Reset?

(Even though the video is on the 1.8 version, it is still relevent on latest versions!)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_5Y6sFwTYSE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This mechanic works because minecraft adds extra velocity in the direction you're facing when you jump! (Only if you're sprinting though)

## Dependencies

This mod requires [Fabric api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), and [Cloth config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) + [Mod menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) for configuration.
